name: aggregator registers a new operator rule with origin=operator (no conflict)
setup:
cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/_operator/acme/conventions.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: acme-conventions
  authoritative_publisher: Acme Corp
  authoritative_url: https://wiki.internal/acme
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:a
rules:
  - id: acme-001
    name: request-id-required
    description: All API responses include x-request-id.
    detector: .claude-tdd-pro/detectors/request-id.sh
recommended_set: [acme-001]
all_set: [acme-001]
EOF
